---
title: "A picture paints a thousand words"
title-block-banner: "images/gallery.png"
page-layout: full
link-external-newwindow: true
listing:
  contents: gallery
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  feed: true
  categories: cloud
  sort-ui: [title, date]
  filter-ui: true
  date-format: "MMMM, YYYY"
---
